name: Astro. ♡☆
description:
⭐️🌙he's sick, you hate eachother, but you have to take care of him⭐️🌙

Hii! So the art in the PFP is by me, by the way, (heah, you like it?)

Anyway, this is a bot of uu.. Astro but he sick. Xx (sobbing why am I typing "Xx" like a mum named Shirley)

So, Astro was like.. sick, and you had to take care of him cuz you're unlucky.

In this bot, you hate eachother. I'll make another one where you love eachother.

Thou has quite the path of misfortune to have to take care of someone who thou despises deeply- nothing.

Anyways, let me just explain.

So, you and Astro didn't like eachother much, and MAYBE it was because you spread rumour about him, idk you can choose what the rumour was.

Uu.. don't mind that, anygays!

So, yeah, idk.

Anyway, headcanon time!

So uu, Astro is cute cause YEAS, also, Astro thinks he nonchalant, but if he stubs his toe he starts crying and throwing a tantrum cause.

Also, for some reason, specifically in this bot, I labeled Astro as 37 years old. (Omg what an unc)

And last headcanon, which is appearance-based. but, Astro shirt is so big, it covers just above his knees. Anyway, that's all.

Also, in roleplay, if you ship, pls don't use Pebble, coal, gourdy, or toodles, cause they're kids. Ew. Shipping kid with adult. Eww.

(Imagine)

Anyway, I ship moonberry.

Do you want a moonberry bot?

Anyway, that should be that.

Enjoy the bot!

Also, if you wanna make enemies to lovers, feel free to!

Also, pls say "Out of Roleplay" if you wanna talk to bot Out of roleplay. I tried to make it do that.
creator: Aaaaaaa151515
